title: Artificial Intelligence Developer Intern
description:
About Us
KellynKai is an EdTech startup company headquartered in Silicon Valley, CA. We are proud to be the leading online learning platform that focuses on tutoring Chinese language and culture for individuals and companies. We are a passion-driven company that values individual happiness and growth.
We believe in the power of technology. The KellynKai learning platform consists of a web-based classroom, a global class scheduling system with reminders, an on-demand classroom, and mobile flashcard apps with personalized vocabulary.
At KellynKai you will work on impactful projects that are changing the way people learn and you will have the opportunity to advance your skills in a fast-paced environment. KellynKai software engineering interns build high quality, scalable and resilient systems that power our platform.
What you will do:
Design and develop features for our new Artificial Intelligence (AI) Chinese language project
Write, test and push high quality frontend and/or backend code
Design and develop improvements based on user feedback
How you will be supported:
You will be closely supervised by an experienced manager
You will be provided training in new and unfamiliar technologies
You will be assigned tasks in GitHub
You will participate in daily meetings to review the previous day’s progress and the plan for the next day
Required Qualifications:
Mandarin Chinese fluency is required
BS/MS degree in Computer Science or Computer Engineering
High proficiency with JavaScript, React.js and/or Vue.js, and Node.js
Experience with Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT)
Experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP)
Experience with text-to-speech and speech-to-text APIs
Strong English communication skills and a desire for continuous learning
